enriched_points.expanded_content: A comprehensive literature review synthesizes existing research on seismic resilience, including design criteria, structural behavior, and innovative techniques to enhance building performance during earthquakes.
Case studies provide practical examples of seismic resilience applications, illustrating successes and failures in real-world scenarios, thereby informing best practices and future design codes.

Conducting interviews with industry experts offers valuable insights into current challenges and advancements in seismic design, enhancing understanding of effective resilience strategies and implementation.
